title: Sweet Dutch Endive Gratin
description: A rich and creamy side dish featuring sweet endive, topped with a nutty dutch cheese.
instructions: Arrange endive leaves in the prepared baking dish.
In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Add garlic and onion and sauté until softened.
Stir in shredded dutch cheese until melted and smooth.
Pour cheese mixture over endive leaves.
Cover baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until top is golden brown.
Optional: sprinkle with additional grated dutch cheese before serving.
